{{Dialogue|Shannon Voorson|Are we safe now, Boo, are we safe?|Boo Rawl|Depends on two things. First, whether or not your mother called ahead to Venir or Renegg for Interdictors…|Deen Voorson|And whether or not we hit somebody.|attr=[[Shannon Voorson]], [[Boo Rawl]] and [[Deen Voorson]]|src=<ref name="AJ9">{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons}}</ref>}}
'''Renegg''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Kuat sector/Legends|Kuat sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
The [[Renegg system/Legends|Renegg system]] served as a staging area for [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] heading out of the [[Kuat Freight Port]].<ref name="PSG">''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''</ref> As a result, Renegg was guarded by [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruisers]].<ref name="AJ9" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Slaying Dragons|reprint=1}} {{1stm}}
